name: vinuni_recovered_content_regression
description: Phase 1.28 regression guards for the content the ingest-filter fix RECOVERED (see LOGS/INGEST_FILTER_AUDIT.md): registrar form PDFs, student-guide/handbook PDFs, and the main-domain /global_exchange/ section — all previously dropped by --student-only. Structural facts (form names, guide existence, the Cornell founding partner), authored from the recovered sources, so these fail loudly if the filter ever silently drops these types again. Complements the ingest drop-report.

cases.question: What form do I use to request a leave of absence, defer, or withdraw at VinUni?
Tôi cần dùng mẫu đơn nào để xin nghỉ học tạm thời hoặc rút khỏi chương trình tại VinUni?
Where can I find the VinUni student guide or handbook?
Which universities can VinUni students go on a global exchange with?
